company_summary: Acme Robotics (https://acme-robotics.example.com) is a growing software company. [MOCK DATA] This summary is a placeholder — configure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to generate a real, research-backed summary.

ideal_buyer_persona.title: VP of Sales
ideal_buyer_persona.description: Owns revenue growth at Acme Robotics and is evaluating ways to scale outbound pipeline without growing headcount.

pain_points: Manual prospecting is slow and inconsistent across reps
Outbound volume doesn't scale with current headcount
Personalizing outreach at scale is hard to maintain

cold_email.subject: Quick idea for Acme Robotics's pipeline
cold_email.body:
Hi {first_name},

Noticed Acme Robotics is scaling its go-to-market motion. ApexGTM helps AI software companies generate qualified pipeline through AI-powered outbound, without adding headcount.

Worth a quick chat this week?

Best,
{sender_name}

follow_up_email.subject: Re: Quick idea for Acme Robotics's pipeline
follow_up_email.body:

Best,
{sender_name}

outreach.linkedin_dm: Hi {first_name}, saw Acme Robotics is growing fast — curious if scaling outbound pipeline is on your radar this quarter?
outreach.cold_call_opener: Hi {first_name}, this is {sender_name} from ApexGTM — I'll be quick. We help GTM teams at AI companies like Acme Robotics generate qualified pipeline without adding headcount. Is that worth 15 minutes on your calendar?

crm_notes: [MOCK DATA] Researched Acme Robotics (https://acme-robotics.example.com). Persona: VP of Sales. Primary pain point: scaling outbound without more headcount. Draft outreach sequence generated and ready for review.
